MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. JENNIFER KRAMER, Esq. of Hennig Kramer Ruiz & Singh, LLP (Tel: 213-310-8301) for plaintiff;
Atty. JUAN C. ARANEDA, Esq. of Fisher & Phillips LLP (Tel: 415-490-9000) for defendant Mindtickle, Inc.;
Atty. MANA ETTEFAGH, Esq. of Lewis Brisbois Bisgaard & Smith LLP (Tel: 415-362-2580) for defendant Steve Reyes.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT MINDTICKLE, INC.'s Motion To Seal Portions Of Defendants Motion To Compel Arbitration.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant Mindtickle Inc.'s unopposed motion to seal is granted. Mindtickle demonstrates good cause to seal based on the nature of this case and its motion is narrowly tailored.

Order signed.
